sections.one_line: Continuous evaluation and delivery of awareness whispers based on timing and priority
Dismissal of a whisper by whisper_id with user_dismissed or already_handled reason
Sources of foresight signals from Tier 2 time-anchored knowledge extraction
Whisper interrupt logging for delivery, failure, suppression, history injection, and promotion checks
File locations for awareness evaluator, whisper injection, and evaluator lifecycle code
